keyEvents.text: Horace Ávila (Belize) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Substitution, Belize. Jahron Myvett replaces Horace Ávila.
Goal!  Guyana 1, Belize 0. Deon Moore (Guyana) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Omari Glasgow with a cross.
Goal!  Guyana 2, Belize 0. Liam Gordon (Guyana) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Nathan Moriah-Welsh.
